## Type

- [ ] Feature (new functionality)
- [ ] Fix (bug correction)
- [ ] Refactor (code improvement)
- [ ] Docs (documentation only)

## Affected Layers

- [ ] Frontend (Next.js/React)
- [ ] Backend (API routes/services)
- [ ] Database (Supabase/PostgreSQL)
- [ ] Config/DevOps

## Changes

-

## Checklist

- [ ] No secrets or .env files
- [ ] No `any` types (strict TypeScript)
- [ ] Tailwind only (no CSS files)
- [ ] RLS policies updated if new tables added

## Test Quality (for PRs that add/modify tests)

- [ ] Test names describe user actions/outcomes (not function names)
- [ ] Mocks are at system boundaries only (HTTP, auth SDK, DB)
- [ ] Tests survive a refactor that preserves behavior
- [ ] Test data is realistic (no "test", "foo", "test@test.com")
